chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 337 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.956/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.957/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Through the instant Constitutional Petition, the petitioners have sought directions against the official respondents on the ground of alleged harassment. Perusal of the record reflects that Petitioner No.1, namely Abdul Rehman, has already approached the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur on the same cause of action by filing Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.4860 of 2025 under Sections 22-A and 22-B, Cr.P.C. An order in his favour has already been passed vide order dated 31.10.2025 by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur Mirs. In these circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI/PS
